stemHtml: Without specific regional agreements, how do two en-route aircraft report their vertical positions?

options.a: Aircraft A reports as a flight level (at or above the lowest usable FL); Aircraft B reports as an altitude (below the lowest usable FL).
options.b: Both report as altitudes if at or above the lowest usable flight level.
options.c: Aircraft A reports altitude at or above lowest usable FL; Aircraft B reports flight level below it.
options.d: Both report as flight levels if below the lowest usable flight level.
